title: B.Pharma Jobs 2026 – Procurement Assistant
shortInfo: HLL Recruitment 2026: 5 Procurement Assistant vacancies. Apply online from 19 May to 03 June 2026 through the official HLL Lifecare website.

basic_details.job_title: HLL Procurement Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: HLL Recruitment 2026: 5 Procurement Assistant vacancies. Apply online from 19 May to 03 June 2026 through the official HLL Lifecare website.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HLL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Degree/ D Pharm / B Pharm
qualification.details: Any Degree/ D Pharm / B Pharm

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for HLL PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the HLL PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT Recruitment 2026 is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT post is Any Degree or D Pharm or B Pharm. Ensure you meet this criterion before proceeding with the application.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 37 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates as per Government of India directives.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies available for the PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT position in HLL Lifecare.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT post ranges from Rs. 10000 to Rs. 20000 per month.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for HLL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the PROCUREMENT ASSISTANT role will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Where is the work location for this job?
faq.answer: The work location is in HLL Bhavan, Mahilamandiram Road, Poojappura, Thiruvananthapuram.
